question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: Apple has the largest market share among all the categories shown.
options.B: Samsung has the largest market share among all the categories shown.
options.C: The Others category has the largest market share among all the categories shown.
options.D: Huawei has the largest market share among all the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Apple has the highest share (71%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Others is largest when relying on visual comparison.
